titleStmt.title: SII 11.204: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 204. (B.K. No. 121 of 1926-27.) NĪLGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A BROKEN SLAB SET UP IN THE KALAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged and mutilated inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva; but its date is lost. It contains some verses in praise of Balavarmayya of the Vatsa lineage, the chief (grāmēśvara) of the village Nīrggunda. Mādimayya Nāyaka and Bhōgādityadēva are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastāṁbrajaṭājāḷabāḷapallavaśāḷinē . brahmāṇḍamaṇḍa
pāraṁbhapūrṇnakuṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . Ōṁ namaśśivāya ©
bhuvana manaśēṣamaṁ vīravṛttiyiṁ nijabhujapratāpadi nāḷu
ttaviralke himadi nāsētuvaraṁ cāḷukyavikramādityanṛ
paṁ © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salutta
© jananātha nāḷvanāḍene tanetarkkaṁ teṁkanāḍe mige sogayipudēṁ
lladalliyuṁ celvina kaṇi yena lesadu tōrppu dereḍaṟunūṟuṁ .
grahāraṁ śrīniḷeyaṁ dharmmabhūmi janamējayadhātrīnāthana
nānīkanivāsa voppuguṁ nīrgguṁda . Alliya vasudhāmarajana
vēdaśāstrapāragaru vumāvallabhapūjānirataru vullasada
śōvitānaru venipar . grāmēśvara nallige vidyāmūrtti sama
cintāmaṇi tējōmaya namaḷinakīrtti mahāmahimana
lavarmmayyaṁ . śrīvatsānvayaviśadasudhāvārddhivivarddha
ṇēśaṁ kēvaḷame namma sujanara dēvaṁ saujanyaśāḷi ba
Adhidaivaṁ pārvvatīvallabha nakhiḷajagatsvāmi śarvvaṁ .
dhātrīnāthacūḍāmaṇi jagadadhipaṁ tailapaṁ naccinā
paṁ tadīyānuja namaḷaguṇaṁ mādivayyaṁ sū
daḷpatnitāṁ jajjaleyene balavarmmaṁ bolinnāro
si negaḷdu śrīmajjanamējayacakravarttiprasādāsā
pārjjita śrīviṣṇubheṭṭōpādhyāya caturvvēdivā
dyācakravarttiprasūtānvayarappa śrīmadūro
nāyakaruṁ mādimayyanāyakaruṁ . ©
trigaḷayya yyavene beḍaṁgiḍidire jīya
rēvayyaṁgaḷo ḷōvajanalte balavarmmayyaṁ .
rati lāvaṇyada kaṇi pativratācaraṇadoḷo
vogaḷvudā rjajjikabbeyaṁ vasumatiyoḷ .
sutarayva rāda ramaḷinaguṇa rujvaḷaya
javadāsanadhikaviḷāsaṁ . tadanujanane ga
rava navaniṁ kiṟiyaṁ tadavarajaṁ bhōgādityadēva
. dayeyo ḷdharmmado ḷārppino ḷvinaya
ryyadoḷ nayadoḷ vikramadoḷ pra
ḷdānaśaktiyo ḷārggaṁ migileṁdu baṇni
yanānandana niṣṭaśiṣṭa parapuṣṭōtkkṛṣṭa
mahāsati yenisida sāyikabbe
nnita patihite sucarita vigatadu
nabalege pāsaṭi raghukuḷana
paḍiyendeḷe pogaḷe sakaḷaja
maḷaguṁadiṁ . Ava rggādar
puṁjaṁ bhuvanaśrastutya nagrā
pādāṁbhōjabhriṁgaṁ guṇani
kāḷimayya tripuru
roḷage mahādēvaṁ
tarukakubanta
galaghunitaṁ
kaṁ śrīsāThe
Digital edition of SII 11.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
